institution.name: The University of Texas Health Science Center at San Antonio

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at The University of Texas Health Science Center at San Antonio rose 123% between 2008 and 2011 ($3.1k → $6.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at The University of Texas Health Science Center at San Antonio rose 50% between 2008 and 2011 ($11.6k → $17.3k).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at The University of Texas Health Science Center at San Antonio are 51% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($82.2k vs $54.5k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at The University of Texas Health Science Center at San Antonio rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 (787 → 930).
